data.title: Microservices Design
data.description: Netflix employs a microservices architecture, allowing independent deployment and scalability of services.
data.technical_spec: Breaks down the application into small, independently deployable services.

data.title: Global CDN Network
data.description: Utilizes a globally distributed content delivery network to serve content efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Edge servers and caching techniques improve latency and performance.

data.title: High-Availability Architecture
data.description: Ensures service availability through redundancy and failover mechanisms.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS and other cloud providers for load balancing and auto-scaling.

data.title: Cross-Region Replication
data.description: Data is replicated across regions for disaster recovery and data resilience.
data.technical_spec: Employs cloud-based replication techniques for data management.

data.title: Centralized API Gateway
data.description: A centralized API gateway manages requests from client devices.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes a single entry point for routing API requests to microservices.
